title: Smoking/Vaping Cessation - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Smoking/Vaping Cessation 20 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE BANDON FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1010 First Street SE Suite 110 Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 347-2529 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE PORT ORFORD FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1312 Tichenor Avenue Port Orford, OR 97465 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 332-1114 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ROSEBURG FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE WINSTON FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 671 SW Main Street Winston, OR 97496 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 492-4550 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AMERICAN LUNG ASSOCIATION OREGON AMERICAN LUNG ASSOCIATION TIGARD LUNG HELPLINE AND TOBACCO QUIT LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on and answers questions about a variety of lung health issues. Areas of expertise include lung cancer, emphysema, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), asthma, air quality, and smoking cessation. The helpline is staffed with licensed registered nurses, respiratory therapists, and certified tobacco treatment specialists. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Suite 165 Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 3am-5pm, Saturday-Sunday 5am-1pm. After-hours message line available. Email (800) 586-4872 - 1-800-, 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BAY AREA FIRST STEP INC RESOURCE DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in space for social activities. Offers assistance with resume building, help to quit smoking, and access to support groups for substance use issues and parenting. 155 S Empire Boulevard Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Individuals and families with minor children in substance use disorder recovery Hours: Monday/Thursday 8am-8pm, Tuesday-Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 1pm-4pm, Sunday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 756-3111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH OUTPATIENT CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services, inpatient and outpatient chemical dependency treatment, and substance use disorder counseling. Treatment incorporates individual, group, and family counseling. Additional assistance includes DUII services, adolescent services, corrections services, smoking cessation, and primary medical care. 750 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 13 and older Hours: Intake hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Program hours vary Email (503) 363-2021 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH STAYTON OUTPATIENT CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Programs include outpatient mental health services, outpatient chemical dependency treatment, and substance use disorder counseling. Treatment incorporates individual, group, and family counseling. Additional assistance includes DUII services, adolescent services, corrections services, smoking cessation, and primary medical care. 631 N 1st Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Age 13 and older Hours: Intake hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Program hours vary Email (971) 772-4309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHANCE ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support, guidance, and resources to help those in recovery. Services offered include relapse prevention groups (Alcoholics Anonymous, Gamblers Anonymous, and Narcotics Anonymous), and classes (smoking cessation and anger management). 231 Lyon Street SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Support Groups: -Men's Narcotics Anonymous: Monday 7pm-8pm -Narcotics Anonymous: Tuesday/Thursday/Saturday/Sunday 7pm-8pm -Wellbriety: Wednesday 6pm-7pm -Gamblers Anonymous: Tuesday 6:30pm-7:30pm -Women for Sobriety: TBD Email (503) 791-3411 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHANCE CHANCE CORVALLIS ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support, guidance, and resources to help those in recovery. Services offered include relapse prevention groups (Alcoholics Anonymous, Gamblers Anonymous, and Narcotics Anonymous). 456 SW Monroe Avenue Suite 108 Corvallis, OR 973335412 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies, call for current schedule Email (541) 224-2750 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHANCE CHANCE LEBANON ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support, guidance, and resources to help those in recovery. Services offered include relapse prevention groups (Alcoholics Anonymous, Gamblers Anonymous, and Narcotics Anonymous). 365 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-3:30pm Email (541) 248-2750 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY CANCER CENTER COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAMS AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides monthly support groups (one for survivors of all cancer types, and two specifically for breast cancer services), in addition to smoking cessation, and tobacco education courses. Volunteer opportunities are also available, including those for people with specialized skills and experience. All volunteers must pass a background check and complete intake procedures. 2880 NW Stewart Parkway Suite 100 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Community outreach and education classes: Varies by service Volunteer opportunities: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 672-0072 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT TOBACCO PREVENTION AND EDUCATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Tobacco Prevention and Education Program works with diverse partners statewide to promote smoke-free environments and communities, reduce the influence of tobacco product marketing, and encourage tobacco users to quit. These programs engage their communities and challenge them to become healthier through preventing tobacco use. 528 E Main Street Suite E John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 575-0429 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TOBACCO CESSATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide referrals to tobacco cessation resources including classes and nicotine replacement 3314 Vandenberg Road Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 882-8846 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFE RENEWAL BEHAVIORAL HEALTH LIFE RENEWAL PORTLAND ADULT AND TEEN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith based comprehensive outpatient substance abuse treatment services. Specializes in cognitive/behavior therapy, dialectical behavior therapy, and telemedicine therapy. Also accepts clients that are referred from the court/judicial system (other than DUI/DWI). 18600 SE McLoughlin Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Age 14 and older Hours: No standard hours Email (855) 932-3582 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL CANCER INSTITUTE CONTACT CENTER CANCER INFORMATION SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about cancer, referral services, and support for smoking/vaping cessation. 9609 Medical Center Drive Building 9609 MSC 9760 Bethesda, MD 20892 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm Email (800) 422-6237 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION TOBACCO QUIT LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support for quitting tobacco and vaping, including phone counseling and referrals to community resources. Eligible callers can receive free nicotine patches or gum. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 784-8669 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UMATILLA COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tobacco cessation counseling. 180 NE 2nd Street Suite 23 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 567-3113 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UMATILLA COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH UMATILLA COUNTY PENDLETON CLINIC TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tobacco cessation counseling. 200 SE 3rd Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 278-5432 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary health care, mental health evaluations, and counseling. Services include routine physicals, women’s health care, behavioral health care, diabetes management, and counseling, physical therapy, specialty care and referrals to specialists, respiratory therapy, and smoking cessation. Has a pharmacy on-site where patients have access to some medications at no charge. 2260 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Age 18 and older -Gross household income 85%-300% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Uninsured patients who meet Volunteers In Medicine eligibility guidelines -Patients who do not qualify for any state funded health care -Oregon Health Plan and Medicare patients not yet assigned to a provider or unable to get a provider -Insured patients with a deductible of $2,500 or more -Medical condition not caused by a motor vehicle accident covered by insurance or a work-related illness or injury that involves Workers' Compensation coverage. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5pm and 5:30pm-8pm (541) 685-1800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE AMERICAN LUNG ASSOCIATION OREGON LUNG HELPLINE AND TOBACCO QUIT LINE BAY AREA FIRST STEP INC RESOURCE DEPARTMENT BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT BRIDGEWAY COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH AND CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY TREATMENT CHANCE ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS CHANCE ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS CHANCE ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS COMMUNITY CANCER CENTER COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAMS AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT TOBACCO PREVENTION AND EDUCATION PROGRAM KLAMATH COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TOBACCO CESSATION LIFE RENEWAL BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT AND TEEN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION TOBACCO QUIT LINE UMATILLA COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING UMATILLA COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC
